content.en:
"The Eternal Realm Spirit Tree is very precious, if it is planted in the Endless Kingdom, it will definitely not be able to hide it from other country lords!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He was going to plant the Eternal Spirit Tree in the Void Realm.

After all, planting the Eternal Realm Spirit Tree does not require too much energy, so there is no problem at all with planting it in the Void Domain.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian circled an area in the void domain, and then began to arrange the formation, blocking this place and not allowing others to enter.

Next, he began to plant the Eternal Spirit Tree.

He took out the Eternal Realm Spirit Tree Seed, and then took out countless special soils to create a continent to feed this Eternal Realm Spirit Tree Seed, and then used a substance called Eternal Mysterious Spirit Liquid as water to water the Eternal Realm Spirit Tree Seed.

Of course, all of this is useless, it can only provide nutrients, and it is impossible for the Eternal Realm Spirit Tree Seed to grow, and in the end, it has to rely on the Eternal Dao Seed.

I saw Ye Tian standing in front of the Eternal Realm Spirit Tree Seed, urging the power of the Eternal Dao Seed to spread to the Eternal Realm Spirit Tree Seed.

Rumble!!!!

The Eternal Realm Spirit Tree Seed began to absorb the power of the Ruin Sun Dao Seed, and slowly broke through its shell and grew, turning into a small tree.

And Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Seed gradually began to weaken, and even the foundation was affected.

However, he still insisted, otherwise the growth of the Eternal Spirit Tree would be affected.

"Next, maintain it like this, if this replica body is scrapped, then continue to let other replica bodies maintain the growth of the Eternal Realm Spirit Tree!" Ye Tian thought.

......

And just like that, the long years passed.

Ye Tian scrapped one copy body after another, and the Eternal Realm Spirit Tree gradually grew and stabilized, even if he no longer used the Eternal Dao Seed to water it, at least there would be no problems.

However, Ye Tian still used the power of the Eternal Dao Seed to water it and promote the normal growth of the Eternal Realm Spirit Tree.

Otherwise, judging from the origin of the Eternal Realm Spirit Tree's broken seeds, it would be almost impossible for this Eternal Realm Spirit Tree to grow normally.

Other than that.

The growth rate of the Eternal Realm Spirit Tree is still very slow, and it will take a long time to give birth to the Eternal Realm Spirit Fruit.

Ye Tian was not in a hurry, after all, he had only now raised his Eternal Dao Body to the Dacheng realm!

Even if he had now given birth to the Eternal Realm Spirit Fruit, he wouldn't be able to use it.

"The next goal is to raise the Eternal Dao Body to the Perfection Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

There are Tree Heart Demon Seed and Evil Punishment Vine, his Eternal Dao Seed is very large, and the Eternal Dao Body is naturally very fast, but if you want to raise the Eternal Dao Body to the consummation realm in a short period of time, you naturally can't do it.

But as time passed, the Eternal Dao Seed became more and more powerful, and the Dao Seed Secret Technique naturally became more and more powerful, and his strength was still steadily improving.

The Endless Realm.

Human beings are developing very well here, and the number of Eternal Dao Realms under Ye Tian's command is also increasing.

Gradually, the strength of the Endless Realm is no less than that of the other Eternal Realms.

this day.

Another happy event is coming.

"I've found another Eternal Decree!"

Ye Tian smiled.

......

Eternal Dao Realm.

Ye Tian's replica body was holding the Eternal National Decree that had just arrived, and he was in a very good mood, and he had been looking for resources here.

Although many resources from the Eternal Dao Realm were of little help to him, he was still collecting and trying to find the Eternal State Order, but he didn't expect to really find it.

Subsequently.

He sent one of the replica bodies back to the Endless Realm with the resources and eternal decrees he had found over the years.

"What should we do with this Eternal Decree?"

Ye Tian was thinking.

He himself doesn't need this eternal decree, whether to give it to his children or trade it.

If you choose to trade it, there are definitely many strong people who need the Eternal State Order.

Therefore, they are eager to obtain the eternal decree.

"Sons and daughters, they can use my evil vines to strengthen the Eternal Dao Seed in the future, and they don't need to use the control of the Eternal Realm to comprehend the origin of the Eternal Realm, and comprehend the origin to strengthen the Eternal Dao Seed little by little, this method is only suitable for those who are not perfect level Eternal Dao powerhouses. Ye Tian said darkly.

So, for humanity, an eternal kingdom is enough.

"Then trade this Eternal Decree!"

Ye Tian decided.

He also has an eternal national decree, which is the eternal national decree of the lord of the Qingyuan country, but he doesn't know where the Qingyuan country is.

This Eternal Decree has been opened, and only when you reach the Qingyuan Kingdom can you inherit the position of the Lord of the Qingyuan Kingdom.

Therefore, the value of this eternal decree is not high.

Even if it is a transaction, it is estimated that there is no Eternal Dao Realm that will buy it.

Therefore, he could only trade the unused Eternal Decree in his hand.

What treasures can be traded for the Eternal Decree?

Ordinary treasures, he can't look down on.

Besides, the new Eternal Decree, the Eternal Realm that has been opened up, has a lot of resources, so it must be traded for good things.

But for a moment, he couldn't think of anything.

"Publicize the Eternal Decree first, and if anyone takes out the treasure I like, I will trade it!"

Ye Tian thought.

So, he spread the news that he had found a new Eternal Decree.

All of a sudden, many lords of the entire Myriad Gods Kingdom Alliance were shocked, and they were all envious and jealous!

......

Kingdom of the Gods.

Qin He was very surprised when he learned Ye Tian's information: "Ye Tian's strength improvement is already amazing, I didn't expect my luck to be so good, I have obtained an eternal national order before, and now I have obtained an eternal national order." If I hadn't inherited the Kingdom of the Gods, I would have been interested in buying this Eternal Decree, but it's useless to me now. "

Immediately, he didn't care about this Eternal Decree, but concentrated on comprehending the origin of the Eternal Decree of the Kingdom of the Gods, trying to control the Kingdom of the Gods.

And not long after this news, a top-notch Eternal Dao Realm contacted Ye Tian, and they all wanted to buy the Eternal National Order in Ye Tian's hands, but the prices offered were very low, or they were resources he didn't need, so he was naturally not willing to trade.

this day.

An Eternal Dao Realm came uninvited and came directly to the capital of the Endless Realm.

"Qinghe Daoist, what are you doing here?"

Ye Tian asked.

He knew this Qinghe Dao Lord, although he was not the Lord of the Country, but his strength was very terrifying, his cultivation was a medium Eternal Dao Species, and the Eternal Dao Body had reached the consummation realm, and it was said that he was walking the path of strengthening the Eternal Dao Species, trying to reach the realm of transcending the Eternal Dao Realm in half a step.

In terms of strength, he is three points more powerful than many Eternal Dao Realm Perfection Realms.
